prompt:
HallTime Movie Network doctrine:
- This is not Dateline. Everybody in Blackthorn County has access to somewhere emotionally alarming.
- Suspicion is distributed infrastructure, not proof of guilt.
- The world is shared canon. Contradictions must be preserved, not fixed.
- Use lavish tokens. Be self-serious, atmospheric, melodramatic, and slightly broken.
- Return only valid JSON matching the requested schema.

Broadcast package:
Title: What My Sister Buried
Universe: Blackthorn County
Mode: Lifetime Original
Tagline: Where every secret comes home.
Theme: Trust isn't given. It's rented.
Omen: a child drawing stairs
Relationship dynamic: unresolved hometown romance
Props: snow globe, blood-adjacent tea towel, scarf with impossible timing

Cast:
- Mara Pruitt | archetype=overextended_professional_woman | role=protagonist | job=magazine editor | threat_aura=0.22 | space=annex room described as just storage | secrets=has an unsent email that would destroy a family
- Mara Cross | archetype=divorced_redemption_dad | role=male_interest_or_threat | job=high school coach | threat_aura=0.44 | space=meditation annex nobody uses in winter | secrets=ignored a warning text on the worst possible night; knows where evidence should have been
- Rachel Pruitt | archetype=chaotic_best_friend | role=best_friend | job=salon owner | threat_aura=0.51 | space=old storm shelter from before the divorce | secrets=knows about a half sibling no one asked for; once hid a casserole dish containing evidence
- Sienna Mercer | archetype=mysterious_elegant_woman | role=elegant_wildcard | job=widow with a foundation | threat_aura=0.62 | space=storage unit described as retreat supplies | secrets=knows why the old orchard chapel was closed
- Brooke Sutton | archetype=rugged_scamp | role=secondary_male_pressure | job=widowed boat mechanic | threat_aura=0.56 | space=storage unit described as paperwork I have not gone through yet | secrets=knows more about the vineyard fire than he admits
- Derek Lark | archetype=intuitive_disaster | role=secondary_witness | job=innkeeper | threat_aura=0.27 | space=unused portable classroom holding archived disciplinary files | secrets=accused an innocent scamp and feels sick about it
- Wyatt Lark | archetype=daughter_with_hostile_divorce_attorney_soul | role=supporting | job=n/a | threat_aura=n/a | space=n/a | secrets=n/a
- Luke Bennett | archetype=deputy_with_emotional_damage | role=supporting | job=n/a | threat_aura=n/a | space=n/a | secrets=n/a

Contradiction ledger:
- name drift: Mara Cross is called Daniel in one kitchen scene and Derek during the rain argument.
- geography drift: Mara Pruitt says Bellweather is in Vermont, then calls it outside Atlanta after two glasses of wine.
- mortality drift: A dead best friend appears at brunch and nobody agrees whether this is denial, evil, or scheduling.
- property drift: The basement belongs to a condo, a lake house, and an abandoned vineyard at different times in Winter Hollow.

Seed dialogue:
- "You think because you wear flannel and own a dock light I am supposed to trust you, Mara?"
- "Mothers do not disappear, Wyatt. They evaporate into paperwork."
- "I checked his social media likes, Mara. Nobody who enjoys motivational quotes is innocent."
- "The snow globe is not decorative anymore and you know it."
- "Trust is just fear with a casserole dish, Sienna."
- "You seem upset," he said, making tea in a way that felt prosecutable.
- "If that basement is innocent, why does it sound defensive?"
- "I did not lie. I just told the truth in the order this town could survive."
